_meta.purpose: WC-5 claims-compile allowlist. Golden-config env pins that are intentionally set but not read directly by a process.env.<KEY> / config-schema reader go here, each with a one-line reason. The default is EMPTY: a pin that no production reader consumes should be removed from golden-config.json, not allowlisted. Use this only for genuinely indirect cases (e.g. a value consumed by a shell entrypoint or a downstream library), and state why.
_meta.rule: Adding an entry here is a reviewed exception, not a routine escape. If you find yourself adding many, the golden-config has dead pins.
